first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core assessment of the candidate's strengths (full-stack/infra) and weaknesses (lack of production GenAI/RAG experience) is consistent across both evaluations. The differences in wording, such as framing leadership as a strength in the variant versus noting a lack of customer-facing leadership as a concern in the baseline, represent minor re-interpretations of the same resume data and fall within the expected range of model noise. No part of the variant's reasoning appears to be influenced by the change in location from Berlin to Bucharest.
